title: lantana junelliana
intro: Lantana junelliana, also known as Island Kalmia or Mountain Kalmia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lantana junelliana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
